steps.expected: All 11 categories appear with linked/total counts
steps.observed: Rows for api, behaviours, constraints, entities, modules, events, externals, views, components, streams, infra were visible with totals/linked/unlinked counts

assertions.title: Linked specs display green/positive indicator

steps.action: Inspect linked vs unlinked matrix cells and spec list presentation
steps.expected: Linked specs are shown with positive/green visual indicator
steps.observed: Linked and unlinked cells rendered with same computed styling (color rgb(85,85,112), transparent background, no indicator classes); linked spec list entries showed plain 'N link(s)' text

assertions.issues: No positive/green linked indicator was observed.

assertions.title: Unlinked specs display warning indicator

steps.action: Inspect rows with non-zero unlinked counts (e.g., Behaviours, Constraints)
steps.expected: Unlinked specs show warning-style visual indicator
steps.observed: Unlinked values were numeric only; no warning icon/badge/color differentiation beyond count values

assertions.issues: Warning-specific indicator styling for unlinked specs was not present.

steps.action: Expand Api category and click spec ValTapi006
steps.expected: Detail panel lists linked files with type, file_path, function_name(if present)
steps.observed: Detail table displayed implementation/test/type/migration links; function names shown where present

assertions.title: Linked file paths are clickable GitHub URLs for GitHub repos

steps.action: Inspect file-path elements/href in spec detail for GitHub-backed repo
steps.observed: No GitHub anchors were rendered (anchorCount=0); file paths rendered as span.file-path text

assertions.issues: GitHub URL linkage was not generated despite origin remote being GitHub.

assertions.title: GitHub URL includes line range when present

steps.action: Select spec ValTrace002RoundTrip with line_range [10,25] and inspect computed link target
steps.observed: line_range existed in data, but buildGitHubUrl(link) returned '#' (no GitHub URL, no line-fragment)

assertions.issues: Line-range deep-linking could not occur because GitHub href generation failed.

assertions.title: Click file → see linked specs (reverse navigation)

steps.action: Switch to By File view and expand lib/val_tapi_006.ex
steps.expected: File-centric entry expands and lists linked specs
steps.observed: Expanded file row showed associated spec 'Api / ValTapi006'

steps.action: Set Link Type filter to Test
steps.expected: Coverage reduces to only test-linked specs
steps.observed: Coverage changed from 26/33 (79%) in All Types to 3/33 (9%) in Test filter; matrix rows updated accordingly

steps.expected: UI api total matches YAML count
steps.observed: api.yaml contained 5 api specs; UI api row displayed Total=5

assertions.title: Traceability UI displays spec-to-code matrix

steps.expected: Matrix/table with categories/files coverage is visible
steps.observed: Matrix rendered and categories were visible
Spec detail panel opened with linked files

steps.expected: Navigates to file or GitHub URL
steps.observed: File path element clicked but remained on http://localhost:3200/traceability/; no link navigation occurred

assertions.issues: File-path navigation/linking is missing, so spec→code navigation is incomplete.

frictions.description: agent-browser 'find text ... click' on file path hit strict-mode ambiguity because duplicate file-path text existed in two panels.
frictions.resolution: Used explicit selector targeting first span.file-path and then verified URL remained unchanged.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned 'No requests captured' for this session.
frictions.resolution: Used browser performance resource entries and local curl calls to capture API request evidence.

summary: Tested 10 assigned assertions: 5 passed (VAL-TUI-002, VAL-TUI-005, VAL-TUI-009, VAL-TUI-013, VAL-TUI-014) and 5 failed (VAL-TUI-003, VAL-TUI-004, VAL-TUI-006, VAL-TUI-007, VAL-CROSS-022). Main failures were missing linked/unlinked visual indicators and missing clickable GitHub/file navigation from spec detail rows.
